mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS plotId, p.base_id AS baseId, p.area AS plotArea, COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) AS harvestedArea, COALESCE(SUM(h.total_yield), 0) AS harvestedYield, MAX(h.harvest_date) AS lastHarvestDate, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) >= p.area THEN 2 WHEN COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS harvestStatus, ROUND( CASE WHEN p.area = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) / p.area, 1) END * 100, 2 ) AS harvestPercent FROM youcai_plots p LEFT JOIN youcai_harvest h ON h.plot_id = p.id AND h.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY p.id, p.base_id, p.area

SELECT p.id AS plotId, p.base_id AS baseId, p.area AS plotArea, COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) AS harvestedArea, COALESCE(SUM(h.total_yield), 0) AS harvestedYield, MAX(h.harvest_date) AS lastHarvestDate, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) >= p.area THEN 2 WHEN COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS harvestStatus, ROUND( CASE WHEN p.area = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(COALESCE(SUM(h.area), 0) / p.area, 1) END * 100, 2 ) AS harvestPercent FROM youcai_plots p LEFT JOIN youcai_harvest h ON h.plot_id = p.id AND h.del_flag = 0 WHERE p.base_id = #{baseId} GROUP BY p.id, p.base_id, p.area
